claim: Claude Opus 4.8 with Ultra Code spawns multi-layer agent teams: orchestrator agent -> execution agents -> verification agents for long coding sessions without human input
actionable: Use Claude Opus with Ultra Code and enable dynamic workflows to leverage the three-layer agent architecture for extended coding tasks
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!

claim: Agentic OS (operating system for business) can be built in <15 minutes with a plan and Ultra Code, tracking competitors, trends, metrics, and skills from one dashboard
actionable: Create a business intelligence dashboard as an agentic OS by defining your tracking needs (content intelligence, competitor analysis, metrics) and letting Claude Opus with Ultra Code build it
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!

claim: Plan mode in Claude Code allows Claude to ask clarifying questions and create a detailed game plan before implementation begins
actionable: Use Plan mode (shift-tab in Claude Code) before writing code; describe your goal and let Claude ask clarifying questions, then save the plan as markdown before switching to Ultra Code
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!

claim: Design systems and branded assets should be included as files in your project folder so Claude automatically applies branding to generated code
actionable: Create a design-system.md file with your branding rules and HTML files with your templates, place them in a /design-system folder in your project, and Claude will apply them automatically
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!

claim: First-pass outputs from Ultra Code are 30-40% complete and require domain expertise to polish to 90-100%; they are starting points, not finished products
actionable: Plan to spend time refining Ultra Code outputs; don't expect 100% production-ready code. Review generated architecture, APIs, and logic carefully before deploying
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!

claim: Ultra Code generates a project with multiple files (HTML, CSS, JS, config) and creates dashboard components with embedded terminal windows for skill execution
actionable: Expect Ultra Code to scaffold a multi-file web application structure; review the generated files for proper separation of concerns and extend as needed
source_title: Claude Opus 4.8 Built an Agentic OS in 15 Minutes!
